name: model rationale detector exit code is zero when all prompts in the registry pass the check
command:
mkdir -p prompts/a prompts/b && printf 'name: a
model: sonnet
model_rationale: cost-quality balance for review workload
' > prompts/a/v1.0.0.md && printf 'name: b
model: opus
model_rationale: required for critical-path verification quality
' > prompts/b/v1.0.0.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/model-rationale.sh" --prompts-dir prompts 2>out.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" = "0" ] && grep -q 'prompts_checked=2' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
